column8: 5-10k pages for google in a week

column3: Technical + cluster strategy can revive growth

column7: Re-index older articles from October & November

column2: Identify affected URLs in GSC → inspect server logs → check hosting limitations, PHP memory limits, timeout issues, broken plugins, database overloads, or CDN conflicts → ensure all important pages return proper 200 status codes
Crawl website using Screaming Frog or Ahrefs → identify URLs with multiple redirects → replace chains with direct 301 redirects to final destination → update internal links to final URLs directly
Export 404 pages from GSC → either restore deleted content, redirect to relevant live pages, or remove internal references entirely → ensure important backlinks pointing to 404s are redirected
Reduce unnecessary page layers → ensure key pages are reachable within 2–3 clicks from homepage → improve category structures → add contextual internal links across articles and pillar pages
Add FAQ sections near bottom of articles → implement FAQPage structured data JSON-LD → include real searchable questions based on People Also Ask and gaming search intent
Add rating/review structured data to game review pages → include review author, rating value, game name, review body, pros/cons where possible
Implement Article or NewsArticle schema across blog pages → include headline, author, publish date, modified date, featured image, publisher details
Optimize Largest Contentful Paint (LCP), Interaction to Next Paint (INP), and CLS → reduce render-blocking scripts → lazy load media → optimize JS/CSS delivery → use CDN caching
Convert images to WebP/AVIF → compress images before upload → reduce oversized featured images → lazy load below-the-fold media
column7: Pillar pages= tool pages + expandable content

column2: Ensure every page has self-referencing canonical tags unless intentionally duplicated → avoid conflicting canonicals → ensure paginated/category pages use proper canonical logic
Ensure important content paths are crawlable → block unnecessary parameter URLs/admin sections → validate robots rules using GSC testing tools
Separate posts/pages/categories into segmented sitemaps → remove redirected/noindex/404 URLs → auto-update sitemap dynamically
Use keyword-relevant anchor text naturally across articles → point supporting articles toward pillar pages → avoid generic “click here” anchors
Identify pages with zero internal links → connect them contextually within relevant clusters → ensure every page belongs to a content silo
Improve mobile readability, spacing, tap targets, and loading performance → ensure gaming comparison tables work properly on mobile
Implement breadcrumb navigation + schema markup to improve crawl pathways and SERP hierarchy visibility
Push newly published URLs through sitemap updates + internal links + external mentions/backlinks to encourage faster crawl prioritization
Identify pages with weak word count/value → merge, expand, or deindex low-quality articles
Add author bios, update dates, editorial standards, references, review methodology, and gaming expertise indicators
Rewrite titles using emotional triggers, numbers, years, platform names, and search intent keywords while keeping within 50–60 characters
Write compelling summaries with action-oriented language and keyword relevance to improve CTR
